coverage_note: Additional foreign privacy, personal information, data, e-privacy, sectoral privacy, and regulator-code records. These are jurisdiction-scoped records and stay in independent jurisdiction databases.

records.title: Law Enforcement Directive
records.summary: EU data protection directive for competent authorities processing personal data for law-enforcement purposes.
key_obligations: Define lawful processing purposes for law-enforcement data.
Keep data accurate, secure, and retained only as needed.
Support rights and safeguards subject to law-enforcement restrictions.

records.title: Data Protection for EU Institutions, Bodies, Offices and Agencies
records.summary: Data protection regime for EU institutions and bodies, aligned with GDPR concepts and supervised by the EDPS.
key_obligations: Apply GDPR-like principles to EU institutional processing.
Maintain accountability, DPO, and rights-handling mechanisms.
Use safeguards for transfers and processors.

records.title: Free Flow of Non-Personal Data Regulation
records.summary: EU rules limiting unjustified data-localisation requirements for non-personal data and supporting data portability between providers.
key_obligations: Assess whether data localisation restrictions are justified.
Plan porting and switching of non-personal data.
Separate mixed datasets from personal-data transfer controls.

records.title: Digital Services Act
records.summary: EU platform regulation with transparency, recommender-system, advertising, risk-assessment, and minor-protection duties that often intersect with personal data use.
key_obligations: Disclose ad and recommender-system parameters where required.
Avoid prohibited targeted advertising practices.
Maintain systemic-risk and transparency controls for covered services.

records.title: Digital Markets Act
records.summary: EU gatekeeper regulation with restrictions on combining personal data and duties around access, portability, and fairness.
key_obligations: Check gatekeeper restrictions before combining data across services.
Support portability and access duties for covered platform data.
Maintain auditable compliance with gatekeeper obligations.

records.title: NIS2 Directive
records.summary: EU cybersecurity directive for essential and important entities, relevant to data security governance and incident response.
key_obligations: Maintain cybersecurity risk-management measures.
Report significant incidents under NIS2 timelines.
Manage supply-chain and vendor cybersecurity risks.

records.title: UK General Data Protection Regulation
records.summary: UK version of the GDPR as retained and amended after Brexit, operating with the Data Protection Act 2018.
key_obligations: Identify lawful basis and transparency duties.
Handle individual rights and special-category data.
Use UK transfer mechanisms for restricted transfers.

records.title: Privacy and Electronic Communications Regulations
records.official_citation: Privacy and Electronic Communications (EC Directive) Regulations 2003
records.summary: UK e-privacy regime for cookies, electronic marketing, communications confidentiality, and related telecom privacy duties.
key_obligations: Obtain cookie consent where required.
Respect direct-marketing consent and opt-out rules.
Protect communications traffic and location data.

records.title: Age Appropriate Design Code
records.official_citation: Age appropriate design: a code of practice for online services
records.summary: ICO statutory code for online services likely to be accessed by children, focused on privacy-by-design and child safeguards.
key_obligations: Put children's best interests at the centre of design.
Use high privacy settings by default.
Limit profiling, geolocation, and nudge techniques for children.

records.title: Data Sharing Code of Practice
records.official_citation: Data sharing: a code of practice
records.summary: ICO statutory code explaining lawful, fair, and accountable data sharing under UK data protection law.
key_obligations: Assess lawful basis and fairness before sharing.
Use data-sharing agreements where appropriate.
Document accountability and transparency decisions.

records.title: HIPAA Privacy Rule
records.summary: US health privacy framework for covered entities and business associates handling protected health information.
key_obligations: Use or disclose PHI only as permitted or authorised.
Provide notice of privacy practices and individual rights.
Use business-associate agreements and safeguards.

records.title: Children's Online Privacy Protection Rule
records.summary: US children's online privacy rule governing collection of personal information from children under 13.
key_obligations: Provide direct notice and online privacy notice.
Obtain verifiable parental consent unless an exception applies.
Limit retention and allow parental review/deletion.

records.title: GLBA Safeguards Rule
records.summary: US financial privacy security rule requiring covered financial institutions to maintain an information security program.
key_obligations: Design and maintain a written information security program.
Assess risks and implement safeguards.
Oversee service providers and monitor controls.

records.title: Fair Credit Reporting Act
records.summary: US credit-reporting privacy law restricting consumer-report use and providing dispute, disclosure, and adverse-action rights.
key_obligations: Use consumer reports only for permissible purposes.
Provide required notices and adverse-action information.
Support dispute and correction processes.

records.title: Oregon Consumer Privacy Act
records.summary: Oregon comprehensive consumer privacy law with controller duties, rights, opt-outs, sensitive-data controls, and assessments.
key_obligations: Provide consumer rights and appeal mechanisms.
Obtain consent for sensitive data where required.
Support sale, targeted-advertising, and profiling opt-outs.

records.title: Delaware Personal Data Privacy Act
records.summary: Delaware consumer privacy law covering consumer rights, notices, sensitive data, opt-outs, and data protection assessments.
key_obligations: Publish privacy notices and support rights.
Control sensitive and child-related processing.
Perform assessments for high-risk processing.

records.title: Iowa Consumer Data Protection Act
records.summary: Iowa consumer privacy law with privacy notices, consumer access/deletion/portability rights, and sale opt-out duties.
key_obligations: Provide clear notices and rights mechanisms.
Disclose categories of data and third-party disclosures.
Offer sale opt-out where applicable.

records.title: Montana Consumer Data Privacy Act
records.summary: Montana comprehensive privacy law covering consumer rights, opt-outs, sensitive data consent, universal opt-out recognition, and assessments.
key_obligations: Support rights and opt-outs.
Obtain consent for sensitive data.
Conduct assessments for high-risk processing.

records.title: Tennessee Information Protection Act
records.summary: Tennessee privacy law with consumer rights, controller duties, and an affirmative-defense mechanism tied to privacy programs.
key_obligations: Maintain privacy notices and rights processes.
Apply opt-out and sensitive-data duties.
Consider documented privacy-program controls.

records.title: Indiana Consumer Data Protection Act
records.summary: Indiana privacy law with controller and processor duties, consumer rights, sensitive-data consent, opt-outs, and assessments.
key_obligations: Provide privacy notice and appeal process.
Execute processor contracts.
Conduct assessments for high-risk processing.

records.title: New Jersey Data Privacy Act
records.summary: New Jersey comprehensive consumer privacy law with rights, opt-outs, sensitive-data controls, and controller obligations.
key_obligations: Support consumer access, correction, deletion, portability, and opt-out rights.
Provide privacy notice and appeals.
Control sensitive data and targeted advertising.

records.title: New Hampshire Privacy Act
records.summary: New Hampshire comprehensive privacy law with consumer rights, opt-outs, controller duties, and sensitive data requirements.
key_obligations: Offer rights and appeals.
Provide clear privacy notices.
Perform assessments for covered high-risk processing.

records.title: Nebraska Data Privacy Act
records.summary: Nebraska privacy law establishing consumer rights, opt-outs, privacy notices, and controller/processor obligations.
key_obligations: Provide rights and opt-out mechanisms.
Disclose data categories and purposes.
Use processor contracts and privacy safeguards.

records.title: Privacy Act
records.summary: Canadian federal public-sector privacy law governing federal institutions' handling of personal information.
key_obligations: Limit collection by federal institutions to operating programs or activities.
Maintain personal information banks and access/correction rights.
Use and disclose personal information under statutory conditions.

records.title: Quebec Act respecting the protection of personal information in the private sector as amended by Law 25
records.official_citation: Act respecting the protection of personal information in the private sector
records.summary: Quebec private-sector privacy law, strengthened by Law 25, with PIA, breach, transparency, cross-border, and automated-decision duties.
key_obligations: Conduct PIAs for certain projects and cross-border disclosures.
Notify confidentiality incidents and maintain records.
Disclose automated decision-making and support rights.

records.title: British Columbia Personal Information Protection Act
records.summary: BC private-sector privacy law covering consent, reasonable purposes, access/correction, safeguards, and retention.
key_obligations: Collect, use, and disclose personal information for reasonable purposes.
Provide access and correction rights.
Protect information and retention practices.

records.title: Alberta Personal Information Protection Act
records.summary: Alberta private-sector privacy law with consent rules, access rights, safeguards, retention, and privacy breach reporting.
key_obligations: Obtain consent or rely on statutory exceptions.
Give access and correction rights.
Report real-risk-of-significant-harm breaches.

records.title: Privacy Regulation 2013
records.summary: Australian regulation supporting the Privacy Act and Australian Privacy Principles, including details for privacy codes and credit reporting.
key_obligations: Check regulatory details supporting Privacy Act obligations.
Align APP code and credit-reporting compliance where relevant.
Use alongside the Privacy Act and OAIC guidance.

records.title: Consumer Data Right Framework
records.standard_code: Competition and Consumer Act 2010 Part IVD
records.summary: Australian data-sharing framework giving consumers rights to direct transfer of specified data to accredited recipients.
key_obligations: Identify whether CDR sector rules apply.
Manage consent, authorisation, and disclosure flows.
Meet accreditation and information-security duties.

records.title: Spam Act 2003
records.summary: Australian electronic marketing law requiring consent, sender identification, and unsubscribe facilities for commercial electronic messages.
key_obligations: Send commercial electronic messages only with required consent.
Identify the sender accurately.
Provide functional unsubscribe facilities.

records.title: Health Information Privacy Code 2020
records.summary: New Zealand health information code modifying privacy principles for health agencies and health information.
key_obligations: Handle health information under health-specific privacy rules.
Provide access and correction rights.
Protect and disclose health information only under permitted conditions.

records.title: Personal Data Protection Regulations 2021
records.summary: Singapore subsidiary regulations supporting PDPA operational duties and exceptions.
key_obligations: Check regulation-level details for PDPA obligations.
Apply prescribed requirements and exceptions.
Use with PDPC advisory guidelines.

records.title: Personal Data Protection (Notification of Data Breaches) Regulations 2021
records.official_citation: Personal Data Protection (Notification of Data Breaches) Regulations 2021
records.summary: Singapore breach-notification regulations specifying notification and assessment requirements under PDPA.
key_obligations: Assess whether a data breach is notifiable.
Notify PDPC and affected individuals where required.
Maintain evidence of breach assessment and response.

records.title: Cabinet Order to Enforce APPI
records.authority: Personal Information Protection Commission / Japanese Law Translation
records.official_citation: Cabinet Order to Enforce the Act on the Protection of Personal Information
records.summary: Cabinet order implementing APPI concepts and operational thresholds.
key_obligations: Use cabinet-order definitions with APPI compliance.
Check prescribed details for data subject rights and disclosures.
Apply APPI implementation thresholds.

records.title: Enforcement Rules for APPI
records.official_citation: Enforcement Rules for the Act on the Protection of Personal Information
records.summary: PPC rules providing implementation details for APPI compliance.
key_obligations: Apply prescribed notices, transfer details, and reporting rules.
Use with APPI and PPC guidelines.
Maintain operational evidence for compliance.

records.title: Enforcement Decree of PIPA
records.official_citation: Enforcement Decree of the Personal Information Protection Act
records.summary: Korean decree implementing PIPA requirements for consent, notices, safety measures, breach reporting, and related duties.
key_obligations: Check decree-level details for PIPA compliance.
Apply prescribed security and reporting measures.
Use decree with PIPA and PIPC notices.

records.title: Credit Information Use and Protection Act
records.official_citation: Credit Information Use and Protection Act
records.summary: Korean financial and credit information privacy law governing credit information processing and rights.
key_obligations: Control use and provision of credit information.
Support individual rights in credit information contexts.
Maintain security and governance controls.

records.title: Information Technology SPDI Rules 2011
records.official_citation: Information Technology (Reasonable Security Practices and Procedures and Sensitive Personal Data or Information) Rules, 2011
records.summary: Indian rules under the IT Act for sensitive personal data or information and reasonable security practices.
key_obligations: Publish privacy policy and obtain consent for SPDI collection.
Restrict disclosure and transfer of SPDI.
Maintain reasonable security practices.

records.title: CERT-In Cyber Security Directions 2022
records.official_citation: CERT-In Directions relating to information security practices, procedure, prevention, response and reporting of cyber incidents
records.summary: Indian cybersecurity directions relevant to incident reporting and log retention for covered entities.
key_obligations: Report specified cyber incidents to CERT-In within required timelines.
Synchronise clocks and retain logs as required.
Maintain incident-response evidence.

records.title: ANPD Regulation on Dosimetry and Application of Administrative Sanctions
records.summary: ANPD regulation on sanction calculation and enforcement factors under LGPD.
key_obligations: Assess sanction exposure and aggravating or mitigating factors.
Maintain evidence of cooperation and governance.
Use enforcement factors in risk scoring.

records.title: Marco Civil da Internet
records.summary: Brazilian Internet Civil Rights Framework with internet-user rights, log retention, and network/application provider obligations.
key_obligations: Check internet log retention and disclosure rules.
Protect user privacy and communications confidentiality.
Use with LGPD for online services.

records.title: Data Protection Ordinance
records.summary: Swiss ordinance implementing the revised FADP with details on security, rights, transfers, and controller duties.
key_obligations: Apply ordinance-level requirements under the FADP.
Check information security and transfer details.
Use with FDPIC guidance for implementation.

records.title: POPIA Regulations
records.official_citation: Regulations Relating to the Protection of Personal Information
records.summary: Regulations supporting POPIA implementation, forms, procedures, and regulator interactions.
key_obligations: Use prescribed forms and processes where applicable.
Support objection, correction, and deletion procedures.
Align direct-marketing processes with POPIA.

records.title: Data Controllers Registry Regulation
records.summary: Turkish registry rules requiring certain controllers to register and maintain processing inventory information.
key_obligations: Determine VERBIS registration obligation.
Maintain accurate processing inventory.
Update registry information when processing changes.

records.title: UAE PDPL Executive Regulations
records.official_citation: Executive Regulations for Federal Decree-Law No. 45 of 2021
records.summary: Implementation layer for UAE PDPL covering notices, rights, controls, and transfer mechanisms where issued or referenced by UAE authorities.
key_obligations: Track executive-regulation requirements for PDPL implementation.
Map controller, processor, and DPO duties.
Assess transfer and breach handling rules.

records.title: PDPL Implementing Regulations
records.official_citation: Implementing Regulations of the Personal Data Protection Law
records.summary: Saudi implementing rules for PDPL obligations, including consent, rights, records, transfers, and breach handling.
key_obligations: Apply implementing-regulation details to PDPL compliance.
Assess transfer conditions and records requirements.
Support rights, consent, and notice processes.
